text:
Athens Times

—

Intense Greek color was the , as the French organizers wanted to honor Greece as a place of birth of the event. France and Greece are connected through Pierre de Coubertin, who revived the Olympics in 1896 and the 2024 closing ceremony had our country in a leading role. The Greek flag entered the Stade de France under the sound of the National Hymn and gave the light to a dystopian world without Olympic Games, while then its appearance made the statue of the Victory of Samothraki, which is located in Louvre. Creepy moments for all Greeks at the closing ceremony of the Olympic Games.

Athens Times

News about Greece and the World.
title: Olympic Games 2024: Creeping moments with the Greek flag and the Victory of Samothrace at the closing ceremony in Paris - Athens Times
